narrative:
Madison Twp township has 1,184 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.7 percentage points.
